steps.title: Track the location
steps.content: The first sentence places audiences at the Marie Hitchcock Puppet Theater. The next sentence describes what audiences experience at that same place, so the transition must point back to the theater.

steps.title: Use a place transition
steps.content: Choice A suggests a goal-directed action, but the sentence describes an experience. Choice B and Choice C signal contrast, which the text does not need. “There” refers back to the theater and connects the two sentences by location. The answer is D.
